# InfoGiph — Full Site Description

InfoGiph transforms your text into stunning, interactive animated infographics in seconds. Paste or import your content — notes, blogs, wikis, presentations, or documents — and InfoGiph generates the most relevant visual format. Every output is fully editable: adjust colors, fonts, layout, and animations to match your brand. A personal workspace keeps your creations organized, and multiple export formats make sharing easy. A free tier lets you try instantly; paid plans unlock higher usage for teams.

## Background (Vision & Mission)
Our mission is to make visual communication effortless so marketing, education, operations, and engineering teams spend energy on ideas, not design tools. The guiding philosophy is "AI generates, you refine": AI creates a polished first draft of your infographic, then you customize every detail with full control. InfoGiph supports multiple content types — from simple notes to full presentations and documents — making it the go-to tool for anyone who needs to communicate visually.

## Content Sections
### [Product & Canvas](https://www.infogiph.com/canvas)
The interactive canvas where you create and edit infographics. Supports text-to-visual generation across multiple formats (notes, blogs, wikis, presentations, documents), drag-and-drop editing, color and font customization, and a personal workspace for managing all your creations.

### [Blog & Tutorials](https://www.infogiph.com/blog)
Practical guides on infographic design, visual storytelling techniques, content formatting tips, and tutorials for getting the most out of InfoGiph. Aimed at non-designers who want professional-looking visual content.

### [Pricing](https://www.infogiph.com/pricing)
Free tier with daily usage for individuals. Paid plans ($8/mo Hobby, $12/mo Professional) for teams and power users needing higher volume and additional features.

### [Policies & Compliance](https://www.infogiph.com/privacy)
Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Cookie Policy — clear on data use, retention, and user rights.

## User Value (Tangible Benefits)
- Time saving: text becomes animated infographics in seconds, no design skills required.
- Full customization: edit colors, fonts, layout, and animations to match any brand or style.
- Multiple content types: create visual notes, blog graphics, wiki illustrations, presentations, documents, and social media content from a single tool.
- Easy sharing: export in multiple formats for docs, decks, social platforms, and client handoffs.
- Affordable scaling: try free with daily usage; paid plans for teams needing higher volume.

## Latest Content (Newest First)
### [InfoGiph Blog](https://www.infogiph.com/blog)
Tips, tutorials, and inspiration for creating effective visual content with InfoGiph. Covers infographic design principles, visual storytelling, and practical how-to guides.
